SYS_DATE: ————-——-——

Structured submission for the full Initiative model. Evidence is enforced at submission, not at review — a claim without a source cannot become SUBMITTED. The score preview is the real engine running on your inputs, deterministically, every keystroke.

02_CLASSIFICATION

03_REACH_EFFORT
04_NPV_INPUTS

Each line is a CLAIM. Make one, owe its source — the gate fires only on what you assert. All optional; what you skip simply scores $0.

blockREFUSED · DRAFT → SUBMITTED BLOCKED

Evidence is enforced at submission, not at review. The failure mode this kills is the number with no source behind it. Resolve the items below — then the gate opens. No source, no submission.

STRUCTURAL FIELDS INCOMPLETE
lib/rubric.mjs gates the submission · lib/score.mjs scores it · the hash-chained ledger and the full prioritize() pipeline run server-side on the Board & Audit routes. This page is synthetic and in-session — no backend persistence in v1. EVIDENCE OK.
TAMPER-EVIDENT DECISION CHAIN · Every line on this surface is regenerated from the system of record and cites a ledger receipt — it cannot go stale, and it cannot be quietly rewritten. SYNTHETIC DEMO DATA; NO CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. Deterministic · zero-LLM in the decision path · local-first.
